blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

You have successfully:

- Navigated to the Notification policies page
- Opened the default policy for editing
- Set the fallback contact point for unmatched alerts
- Configured how alerts are grouped into notifications
- Saved the updated default policy

---

### More to explore

Now that you've configured the default policy, explore these related tasks:

- [Create a child notification policy](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-create-child-policy/) to route specific alerts to dedicated contact points
- [Notification policies documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/notifications/notification-policies/) for the full reference

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this one:

- [Create a child notification policy](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-create-child-policy/)
- [Create a silence](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/create-silence/)
- [Configure a mute timing](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/configure-mute-timing/)
